total_sales_pln: Total sales in Polish zloty (PLN) for the selected period, sum of gross revenue.
promo_share: Percentage of total sales attributed to promotional transactions in the selected period.
avg_discount_depth: Average discount depth: the mean percentage discount applied on promo sales. Indicates how deep the price cuts were.
active_categories: Number of product categories with at least one sale in the period.
gross_pln: Gross revenue in PLN (zloty). Sales value before any adjustments.
peak_event: Peak event or period (e.g. Black Friday, holidays) when sales are concentrated.
roi: Return on Investment: promo ROI. Formula: (Incremental sales - Promo cost) / Promo cost. As a percentage, it indicates how much each zloty spent on promo generates in extra sales.
uplift: Percentage increase in sales vs baseline (expected sales without promo). Measures the net effect of the promotion.
baseline: Expected sales in absence of promotion. Used as reference to calculate uplift and incremental sales.
incremental: Incremental sales: the portion of sales attributable to the promo (above baseline). The real campaign gain.
attributed_sales: Sales attributed to the promotion during the active promo period.
total_cost: Total promo cost: discount granted + media spend (communication investment).
discount_cost: Discount cost: value of the discount given to customers (margin conceded).
media_cost: Media cost: investment in communication and campaigns (ads, influencer, co-op) for the promo.
funding_type: Who funds the promo: merchant_funded (retailer), brand_funded (brand), mixed (both).
aov: Average Order Value: mean value per order (total spend / number of orders).
segment: Customer group (HCG) with similar demographic and behavioral profile. Click a segment to filter metrics.
category: Product family. Filter metrics for a single category.
promo_type: Promotion type (e.g. Discount, BOGO). Filter by type to compare performance.
sales_by_category: Revenue distribution by product family. Useful to see where sales are highest.
promo_share_chart: Sales split: promo vs non-promo share in the period.
peak_sales: Aggregate sales by peak event (Black Friday, Christmas, etc.).
top_promo_roi: Promotions ranked by average ROI: which campaigns returned the most vs cost.
yoy_trend: Year-over-Year comparison: total sales per year to track growth.
sales_detail: Detailed table: date, category, brand, revenue, units, promo flag, segment. Click a row to filter by category.
performance_by_promo_type: Attributed and incremental sales by promotion type.
uplift_by_category: Average uplift by category: in which product families promos drive the most.
promo_timeline_baseline: Time series: promo attributed sales vs baseline sales (without promo).
promo_ranking: Promotion list with attributed sales, incremental, ROI, uplift and cost.
spend_by_segment: Total spend (PLN) by customer segment in the period.
seasonality: Sales distribution by quarter and segment: when each group buys.
spend_distribution: Average lifetime spend by segment (engagement and lifetime value).
baseline_daily: Average daily sales without promo (historical). Base for simulation.
estimated_promo_daily: Estimated daily sales during promo based on type, discount and duration.
projected_uplift: Estimated uplift percentage of the simulation vs baseline.
historical_uplift_type: Historical average uplift by promo type: reference for choosing type in simulation.
response_rate_segment: Conversion rate by segment: share of segment customers who respond to promos.
sales_projection: Total sales comparison: baseline (non-promo period) vs simulated scenario.
total_buyers: Number of unique customers who purchased in the selected category.
total_spend_pln: Total revenue in the category for the period.
avg_order_pln: Average order value (AOV) in the category.
buyers_by_segment: Number of buyers by HCG segment in the category.
purchase_motivation: Main driver pushing the segment to buy in the category.
yoy_growth_segment: Spend trend by year and segment: growth or decline by group.
radar_profile: Multi-dimensional segment comparison: buyers, spend, units, avg discount, promo dependency.
segment_detail: Table: segment, motivation, buyer count, spend, units, avg order.
